channel.title: codedinsugar.com

item.title: Blog Roadmap
item.description: Before the score comes the goal July 2022 Intro posts August 2022 Configure a light|dark|colored mode September 2022 Add a custom logo and a main page image October 2022 Persist the navigation menu (current styling auto hides it) November 2022 Maintain a one post per week minimum standard December 2022 End of year wrap up

item.title: Whoami
item.description: Interesting reaction, but what does it mean? -Jack Skellington I am an Engineer at heart. I respect the symbiant circle of simplicity and complexity for the IT field of practice. Although our industry has seen a paradigm shift to the Cloud, I am grateful to have been part of the preceeding movement. Working with physical equipment on-premise brings a tangible sense of fulfillment. The best commit one can push is to take a step back and look at the bigger picture.
